form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 30 days. Last outing finished fourth of 9 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Champion Hurdle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3300m, 9 len behind Lossiemouth carrying 74.5kg at $23. The start before that; tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len Wincanton in a G2 Kingwell Hurdle on February 14 over 3000m on heavy track defeating Rubaud with 73.5kg at $1.50 in a jumps. Interesting runner and unexposed over this longer trip.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 30 days. The start before that; tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len Wincanton in a G2 Kingwell Hurdle on February 14 over 3000m on heavy track defeating Rubaud with 73.5kg at $1.50 in a jumps. Interesting runner and unexposed over this longer trip.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 38 day letup. Last outing to post a big 21 len win. Leopardstown on March 2 over 3721m defeating Soir De Garde carrying 73kg at $1.30 in a hurdle. The start before that; raced on the pace prior to fading ran last in a small field at Leopardstown in the G1 Irish Champion Hurdle on February 1 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 20 len behind Brighterdaysahead with 75.5kg at $9. Has to be considered for Willie Mullins' who is bidding for a hat-trick in this.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after two months finished 12th of 24 starters at Cheltenham on March 11 over 4200m, 20 len behind Jingko Blue with 74.5kg at $13. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Newbury on December 17 over 4500m, 1.5 len behind Jig's Forge with 72kg at $1.40. A lot more needed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Second-up today. Fresh up after two months finished 12th of 24 starters at Cheltenham on March 11 over 4200m, 20 len behind Jingko Blue with 74.5kg at $13. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at Newbury on December 17 over 4500m, 1.5 len behind Jig's Forge with 72kg at $1.40. A lot more needed.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 46 day let-up. Last start favourite; came from midfield and won by 2 len Fontwell Park in a G2 National Spirit Hurdle on February 22 over 3800m on heavy track defeating Brewin'upastorm carrying 73kg at $1.50 in a jumps. Before that favourite; won by 1.3 len Windsor on January 16 over 4000m slow going defeating Altobelli with 73.5kg at $3 in a hurdle. Going up in class but not entirely ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 46 day let-up. Before that favourite; won by 1.3 len Windsor on January 16 over 4000m slow going defeating Altobelli with 73.5kg at $3 in a hurdle. Going up in class but not entirely ruled out.

form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last run finished third of 9 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Champion Hurdle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3300m, 7 len behind Lossiemouth with 74.5kg at $4. Before that tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.5 len Cheltenham in a G2 International Hurdle on January 24 over 3400m slow track defeating Nemean Lion with 73kg at $3.30 in a jumps. Top chance up in trip.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Freshened for 30 days. Last run finished second of 9 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Champion Hurdle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3300m, 6 len behind Lossiemouth carrying 71kg at $4.50. The run before won by 3.5 len Leopardstown in a G1 Irish Champion Hurdle on February 1 over 3218m on heavy track defeating Lossiemouth with 72kg at $3.80 in a jumps. Impressed last start. Has to be considered.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after three months finished fifth of 9 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Champion Hurdle Challenge Trophy on March 10 over 3300m, 9 len behind Lossiemouth carrying 71kg at $13. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by 1.5 len Newcastle in a G1 Fighting Fifth Hurdle Race on November 29 over 3400m defeating Anzadam carrying 71kg at $23 in a jumps. Should run her race but needs more.
